org.springframework.data.domain.SearchResult

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.domain
Central domain abstractions especially to be used in combination with the Repository abstraction.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    SearchResults<T>
    Value object encapsulating a collection of SearchResult instances.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <U> SearchResult<U>
    SearchResult.map(Function<? super T, ? extends U> converter)
    Creates a new SearchResult by applying the given mapping Function to this result's content.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.domain that return types with arguments of type SearchResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<SearchResult<T>>
    SearchResults.getContent()
    Return the actual content of the SearchResult items as an unmodifiable list.
    Iterator<SearchResult<T>>
    SearchResults.iterator()
     
    Stream<SearchResult<T>>
    SearchResults.stream()
    Returns a sequential Stream containing SearchResult items in this SearchResults instance.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SearchResults(List<? extends SearchResult<T>> results)
    Creates a new SearchResults instance from the given list of SearchResult items.
